summary:
Recovery: Excellent

Reading: Halfway through the day and the morning call is holding — your overnight numbers actually firmed up on the re-sync, with your system reading clearly above its weekly line even off a genuinely short night. You've banked about 3,100 steps and over two hours on your feet, all of it light effort, so the reserve is still nearly full and the real output window is wide open this afternoon. Three meals are down including lunch, but protein is the lagging number — you're at 66 grams with 72 still to go, and fat's already at target, so the rest of the day needs to be lean and protein-first.

Performance: Push hard. The green light from this morning still stands and you've barely spent any of it — take the afternoon for real output, and back it with protein-dense food since that gap is the only thing off pace.

Transit: none
